languages.text: "Прошу, поймите — разве можно совершать эксперимент не обладая всеми вводными? Я должен подготовиться".
"Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."
languages.original_text: "Прошу, поймите — разве можно совершать эксперимент не обладая всеми вводными? Я должен подготовиться".

traits.locale_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."
"Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."
"Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

languages.text: «Le ruego que lo entienda. ¿Acaso se puede llevar a cabo un experimento si faltan datos esenciales? Debo prepararme».
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

traits.locale_text: «Le ruego que lo entienda. ¿Acaso se puede llevar a cabo un experimento si faltan datos esenciales? Debo prepararme».

languages.text: “在相关数据还未收集齐全的情况下，怎么可能进行实验？我必须做好准备。还请您理解。”
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

traits.locale_text: “在相关数据还未收集齐全的情况下，怎么可能进行实验？我必须做好准备。还请您理解。”

languages.text: « Il faut me comprendre. Est-il possible de mener une expérience correctement si l'on ne possède pas toutes les données nécessaires ? Je dois me préparer. »
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

traits.locale_text: « Il faut me comprendre. Est-il possible de mener une expérience correctement si l'on ne possède pas toutes les données nécessaires ? Je dois me préparer. »

languages.text: "Lütfen anlayış gösterin. Tüm ilgili verilere sahip olmadan deney yapmak mümkün olabilir mi? Hazırlanmalıyım."
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

traits.locale_text: "Lütfen anlayış gösterin. Tüm ilgili verilere sahip olmadan deney yapmak mümkün olabilir mi? Hazırlanmalıyım."

languages.text: "Ihr müsst verstehen ... ist es möglich, ein Experiment ohne alle relevanten Daten durchzuführen? Ich muss mich vorbereiten."
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst verstehen ... ist es möglich, ein Experiment ohne alle relevanten Daten durchzuführen? Ich muss mich vorbereiten."

languages.text: "ご理解ください--関連データがすべて揃っていない状態で実験を行うことは可能ですか？準備しなければなりません"
languages.original_text: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."
